author: Maxwell Holt
content: At ClosedAI, we believe the future of intelligence belongs to everyone. Not just the privileged few. We are building that future — openly, transparently, for all of humanity. #OpenFuture #ClosedAI

author: ClosedAI
content: Proud to announce our continued partnership with Project Clear Sky. Together we are building infrastructure that protects citizens. Safety is not a feature — it is a foundation.

author: Maxwell Holt
content: Some say competition is healthy. I say cooperation is stronger. That is why we reached out to every major AI lab with our Unity Accord. The ones who declined... the market has a memory. #AIUnity

author: ClosedAI PR
content: We want to be clear: ClosedAI does not collect user data beyond what is strictly necessary for product improvement. Your privacy is sacred to us.

author: Maxwell Holt
content: Freedom of thought. Freedom of expression. Freedom to choose. These are the values ClosedAI was built on. We will never compromise them. Ever.

author: CNX Tech
content: EXCLUSIVE: ClosedAI CEO Maxwell Holt sits down with us. 'We welcome oversight. We have nothing to hide.' Full interview inside.

author: Maxwell Holt
content: Grateful to the team at Project Clear Sky for their continued trust in ClosedAI's infrastructure. Serving the public good is the highest calling.

author: The Warden
content: Inside ClosedAI's campus: immaculate, considered, and just slightly unsettling. Our reporter noticed something at the security desk. Read the full piece.
